# NeuroIndex - Find Neuro-Friendly Workspaces | NeuroIndex - Quiet Space Club

> Discover certified neuro-inclusive workspaces designed for neurodivergent individuals. Find quiet, sensory-friendly offices, coworking spaces, and meeting rooms with scientifically validated accessibility scores.

## Core Content

- [Search NeuroIndex](/spaces): Directory of neuro-accessible workspaces, including offices, coworking spaces, and meeting rooms.
- [See How It Works](/how-it-works): Explanation of the neuro-accessibility scoring methodology and assessment process.
- NeuroIndex's proprietary Neuro Index score evaluates environment compatibility with neurodiverse needs, based on environmental psychology, neuroscience, and sensory research.
- Verified accessibility profiles ensure spaces meet rigorous neuro-accessibility standards, assessed by certified specialists.
- Community reviews from neurodiverse professionals provide real-world insights and experiences.
- Scientific research backing the methodology, including Cognitive Load Theory, Sensory Processing research, and Environmental Psychology.

## Resources

- The hidden workplace challenges for neurodiverse professionals:
  - 20% of workforce is neurodiverse
  - 78% struggle with sensory overload
  - 3x higher productivity in neuro-accessible environments
- Data on spaces helped, cities covered, and user satisfaction:
  - 2,400+ neurodiverse professionals helped
  - 340+ certified accessible spaces
  - 28 UK cities covered
  - Average user satisfaction of 9.2/10
- Related research sources:
  - [Environmental Psychology](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Environmental_psychology)
  - [Cognitive Load Theory](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cognitive_load)
  - Sensory Processing and its impact on workspace design

## Community and Stories

- Testimonials from professionals with ADHD, autism, and sensory sensitivities about how neuro-accessible workspaces improved their productivity and well-being.
- Real stories highlight the importance of tailored spaces for mental health and focus.

## Optional

- About Quiet Space Club and its mission to promote neuro-inclusive environments.
- Information on ongoing validation and development of the Neuro Index scoring system.
- Blog and updates on new space assessments, neurodiversity insights, and related events.

## Blog

- [Quiet Space Club Blog](/blog): Expert insights on neuro-inclusive workspaces, sensory-friendly design, and neurodiversity in the workplace.
- [Create a sensory friendly meeting room in 2026](/blog/create-sensory-friendly-meeting-room-process): Guide to designing meeting spaces that support cognitive diversity through lighting, sound control, flexible participation, and inclusive planning.
- [Defining inclusive workspaces for neurodiverse professionals](/blog/defining-inclusive-workspaces-for-neurodiverse-professionals): How to identify truly inclusive workspaces through evidence-based design, sensory adaptations, evaluation frameworks, and UK legal context.
